latest.title: Beached trees aren't dying they're just visiting
latest.script_key: i love this one see how the bark is still tight and the roots look fresh that s because these trees didn t wash ashore they re just visiting their roots stretch into fresh groundwater below the sand that s why they stay alive for weeks

latest.title: Tall trees have sky-facing bark scars you missed
latest.script_key: trees watch the sky see those shining scars on the trunk that s bark peeled back like an eyelid it s not damage it s a skylight the tree grows thinner there so light hits the inner layer saving energy that s why old giants have these windows would you climb one

latest.title: Why dog paws explain the move right before the move

latest.title: Chickens keep their view steady while walking
latest.script_key: chickens lock their view between steps watch the eyes stay level while the body steps forward because chickens stabilize their view in tiny pauses that helps them judge distance and spot danger without the world blurring once you see the pause the walk feels different did you notice it
